tool_args.label: Capital Program Committee Meeting April 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Metropolitan Transportation Authority - Capital Program Committee Meeting - April 2024 - Monday, 4/29/2024 2:00-3:00 PM ET

payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: Capital Program Committee Meeting book for April 2024 meeting held on 4/29/2024, covering procurement actions, capital program status, C&D systems update, safety report, and committee work plan.

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Phase 2
tool_args.raw_text: Modification to add Phase 2 of the Park Avenue Viaduct replacement, from East 127th Street to midblock between East 131st and East 132nd Streets.

payload.description: Phase 2 of the Park Avenue Viaduct replacement on Metro-North Railroad, from East 127th Street to midblock between East 131st and East 132nd Streets. Performed under contract MN-171020 with Halmar International, LLC.

tool_args.label: Rye Station Repairs
tool_args.raw_text: Rye Station Repairs - Modification for additional concrete repairs to a 40-foot section of platform at Metro North Railroad's Rye Station.

payload.description: Concrete repairs, platform edge and joint replacement at platforms, and steel stair repairs at Metro-North Railroad's Rye Station. Additional concrete repairs to a 40-foot section of platform.

tool_args.label: Coney Island Yard Flood Mitigation - PLC System
tool_args.raw_text: Coney Island Yard Complex Long Term Flood Mitigation - Modification for purchase and installation of additional signal wiring for the new signal Program Logic Controller system

payload.project_name: Coney Island Yard Complex Long Term Flood Mitigation
payload.description: Modification for purchase and installation of additional signal wiring for the new signal Program Logic Controller (PLC) system being installed in the Coney Island Yard.

tool_args.label: Upgrade Asynchronous Network (Ring F)
tool_args.raw_text: Upgrade Asynchronous Network W47013 - 90% complete, $25M Estimate at Completion, Substantial Completion 03/2024

payload.description: Upgrade Ring F on the existing Asynchronous Fiber Optic Network to SONET technology to increase capacity and reliability. Rings A and C already upgraded.

tool_args.label: Emergency Alarm Rollout & Pilot
tool_args.raw_text: Emergency Alarm Rollout & Pilot S32288 - 2% complete, $129.5M Estimate at Completion, Substantial Completion 6/30/2028

payload.description: Install Emergency Alarm and Emergency Telephone (EA/ET) systems on elevated structures in areas where no EA/ET system exists (dark territory) and upgrade existing Emergency Alarms System at one zone control area.

tool_args.label: Hudson Line Power/Communications/Signal Improvements Phase I
tool_args.raw_text: Design Build Power/Communications and Signal Infrastructure Improvements from CP-5 to CP-35 Hudson Line, Phase I - Modification to replace damaged trough and conduit carrying communications and power cables on MNR's Hudson Line

payload.project_name: Design Build Power/Communications and Signal Infrastructure Improvements from CP-5 to CP-35 Hudson Line, Phase I
payload.description: Design and construction of power, communications and signal infrastructure improvements on Metro-North Railroad's Hudson Line. Modification to replace damaged elevated trough and conduit with new ductbank and trough buried at grade after mudslide damage.

tool_args.label: BMT Traction Power Control System Upgrade
tool_args.raw_text: BMT Traction Power Control System Upgrade C34866/7 - 65% complete, $55M Estimate at Completion, Substantial Completion 08/2025

payload.project_name: BMT Traction Power Control System Upgrade
payload.description: Replace antiquated Master Terminal Units at the Power Control Center with touchscreen LED monitors and state-of-the-art video wall, construct a new Emergency Backup Power Control Center. Work at 13 power substations, 14 communications rooms, and the Power Control Center.
Capital Program Committee Meeting held 2:00-3:00 PM ET

tool_args.label: New ADA-accessible elevators opened at Tremont Avenue B/D Station
tool_args.raw_text: the opening of new ADA-accessible elevators at the Tremont Avenue B/D Station, making it the second subway station and the fifth overall MTA station to be made accessible this year

payload.description: Opening of new ADA-accessible elevators at the Tremont Avenue B/D Station, making it the second subway station and the fifth overall MTA station to be made accessible this year.

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Phase 2 - Design-Builder Directed to Proceed
tool_args.raw_text: On April 8, 2024, the Design-Builder was directed to proceed up to a not-to-exceed amount of $2,800,000 to mobilize and perform early survey, design and exploratory work.

payload.description: Design-Builder directed to proceed up to a not-to-exceed amount of $2,800,000 to mobilize and perform early survey, design and exploratory work for Phase 2 of the Park Avenue Viaduct replacement.

tool_args.label: MTA signed national Equity in Infrastructure pledge
tool_args.raw_text: MTA signing the national Equity in Infrastructure pledge to increase the number, size, and proportion of minority-owned, women-owned, and disadvantaged businesses working in the Capital Program

payload.claim_text: MTA signing the national Equity in Infrastructure pledge to increase the number, size, and proportion of minority-owned, women-owned, and disadvantaged businesses working in the Capital Program.

tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing $15 billion for Capital Program
tool_args.raw_text: $15 billion for the Capital Program. The President reiterated that until the ongoing congestion Pricing litigation is resolved, the majority of new procurement actions remain on hold.

payload.claim_text: $15 billion for the Capital Program from Congestion Pricing. Until litigation is resolved, the majority of new procurement actions remain on hold.

tool_args.label: 59 miles of CBTC on A/C and B/D/F/M lines on hold
tool_args.raw_text: 59 miles of Communications-Based Train Control (CBTC) on the A/C and B/D/F/M lines

payload.claim_text: 59 miles of Communications-Based Train Control (CBTC) on the A/C and B/D/F/M lines are on hold due to congestion pricing funding delay.

tool_args.label: Fulton A/C and 6 Av/63 St B/D/F/M lines serve more than 1.5M daily riders
tool_args.raw_text: The Fulton A/C and 6 Av/63 St B/D/F/M lines serve more than 1.5 million daily riders

payload.claim_text: The Fulton A/C and 6 Av/63 St B/D/F/M lines serve more than 1.5 million daily riders.

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Phase 2 adding to Phase 1 contract yields savings
tool_args.raw_text: overall schedule savings of approximately 18 months and overall cost savings of approximately $70 million ... reducing the need for weekend service outages by 60% (eliminating approximately 24 weekend outages)

payload.claim_text: Adding Phase 2 to the existing Phase 1 contract results in overall schedule savings of approximately 18 months and overall cost savings of approximately $70 million relative to procuring a separate contract. Performing both phases simultaneously reduces weekend service outages by 60% (eliminating approximately 24 weekend outages).

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct carries 750 trains per day
tool_args.raw_text: 750 passenger trains a day – either travels over the Park Avenue Viaduct or connects with a train that does

payload.claim_text: Every train MNR operates east of the Hudson River – 750 passenger trains a day – either travels over the Park Avenue Viaduct or connects with a train that does.
